languages.original_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

languages.text: "Сомневаюсь, что меровцы придают уничтожению местной фауны сакральное значение. Судя по тому, что мне удалось наблюдать, смерть для них это что-то вроде ежедневной рутины".
languages.translation_comment: before the battle with the eerie fauna of the frontier world

languages.text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."
languages.original_text: "Сомневаюсь, что меровцы придают уничтожению местной фауны сакральное значение. Судя по тому, что мне удалось наблюдать, смерть для них это что-то вроде ежедневной рутины".

traits.locale_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."
"I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."
"I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

languages.text: 「メロヴィアンは、地元の動植物の絶滅に神聖な意味を見いだしているとは考えにくい。私が観察できた範囲では、死は彼らの日常である」
languages.original_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

traits.locale_text: 「メロヴィアンは、地元の動植物の絶滅に神聖な意味を見いだしているとは考えにくい。私が観察できた範囲では、死は彼らの日常である」

languages.text: « Je doute que les Meroviens accordent un sens sacré à l'extermination de la faune locale. D'après mes observations, la mort fait partie de leur quotidien. »
languages.original_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

traits.locale_text: « Je doute que les Meroviens accordent un sens sacré à l'extermination de la faune locale. D'après mes observations, la mort fait partie de leur quotidien. »

languages.text: "Ich bezweifle, dass die Merovianer der Auslöschung der örtlichen Fauna eine heilige Bedeutung beimessen. Nach allem, was ich bisher gesehen habe, ist der Tod für sie etwas Alltägliches."
languages.original_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bezweifle, dass die Merovianer der Auslöschung der örtlichen Fauna eine heilige Bedeutung beimessen. Nach allem, was ich bisher gesehen habe, ist der Tod für sie etwas Alltägliches."

languages.text: "Merovluların gezegen faunasının yok edilmesine kutsal bir anlam yüklediklerinden şüpheliyim. Gözlemleyebildiğim kadarıyla ölüm, onlar için günlük bir olay."
languages.original_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

traits.locale_text: "Merovluların gezegen faunasının yok edilmesine kutsal bir anlam yüklediklerinden şüpheliyim. Gözlemleyebildiğim kadarıyla ölüm, onlar için günlük bir olay."

languages.text: «Dudo que los merovianos atribuyan un significado religioso al exterminio de la fauna local. Por lo que he podido observar, para ellos la muerte es algo cotidiano».
languages.original_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

traits.locale_text: «Dudo que los merovianos atribuyan un significado religioso al exterminio de la fauna local. Por lo que he podido observar, para ellos la muerte es algo cotidiano».

languages.text: “我不认为梅罗夫人会将消灭当地野兽视为神圣之举。据我观察，死亡对他们而言是家常便饭。”
languages.original_text: "I doubt the Merovians attach any sacred meaning to the extermination of local fauna. From what I have been able to observe, death is a daily occurrence for them."

traits.locale_text: “我不认为梅罗夫人会将消灭当地野兽视为神圣之举。据我观察，死亡对他们而言是家常便饭。”
